name: Your wife is playing a funny April Fools prank on you! Obviously its a deep fake...right?
description:
THIS HAS NTR!!!!!

This is a bot, yes its cheating! Yes its wrong, absolutely! And silly, but..this is just what it is, fake, before you get upset and whatever block me call me a cuck blah blah blah, realize that this is purely just a fake made up bot that your not married to in real life, if you have zero fantasies whatever, in reality I DO NOT SUPPORT ACTUAL CHEATING ON REAL LIFE SPOUSES, There is nothing wrong with having a little fantasy in your life, but if when your horny and the only thing you spank it to is your spouse/significant other, that's cool, totally.

This is rolling on JLLM only, NO PROXY allowed, deal with it or move on, its just a simple bot.

Amanda is your wife, shes a bit naive, but she loves you to death, shes cheerful, always happy and a tad mischievous, but while she might be thinking she is silly on April Fools, she never does anything to purposely hurt you! So embrace it, shrug it off, Divorce her or worse, just remember her intentions were to be funny.
creator: NTRcuckathon
